HGSS.409.0002:
Ben: This is your DJ Ben, bringing you the
Pokémon Music Channel!
HGSS.409.0003:
Today’s a happy Sunday! This is a great
album with some famous songs that always
takes me back to wonderful memories of
my best friend!
HGSS.409.0004:
Today’s Monday, and you know what that
means, right? It means it’s time to
wake your Pokémon up with a march!
HGSS.409.0005:
Today’s Tuesday! Time to put your
Pokémon to sleep with a soothing Pokémon
lullaby!
HGSS.409.0006:
Today’s Wednesday, and you know what
that means, right? It means it’s time to
wake your Pokémon up with a march!
HGSS.409.0007:
Today’s Thursday! Time to put your
Pokémon to sleep with a soothing Pokémon
lullaby!
HGSS.409.0008:
Today’s Friday, and you know what that
means, right? It means it’s time to
wake your Pokémon up with a march!
HGSS.409.0009:
Today’s Saturday! Time to put your
Pokémon to sleep with a soothing Pokémon
lullaby!
HGSS.409.0010:
Wednesday’s Pokémon Music is the Hoenn
Sound that carries a hint of Hoenn Region
taste! The Hoenn music might just lure a
bunch of Pokémon to follow you!
HGSS.409.0011:
Thursday’s Pokémon Music is the Sinnoh
Sound that carries a hint of Sinnoh
Region atmosphere! The Sinnoh music, the
sound of the great land to the north,
might just lure a bunch of Pokémon to
follow you!
HGSS.409.0012:
Today’s Sunday, and you know what that
means, right? It means it’s time to
wake your Pokémon up with a march!
